summary: Iteration 9 — Full validation of Pro Tools-style Window menu, View→Waveforms submenu, SystemUsageModal (24 cores), DiskUsageModal (5 volumes + 48 kHz 24-bit math), and regression of the existing 9 menus. 9/9 review scenarios PASS. Backend 42/42 pytest pass.
action_items: CARRY-OVER (not introduced this iter, noted since iter 8): hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' from TrackRow line 71. Wrap the option label as plain text instead of rendering a <span> inside <option>.
MINOR perf warning (not a bug): Canvas2D getImageData in BantuTeaser triggers 'willReadFrequently' hint. Set { willReadFrequently: true } on getContext('2d') call to suppress and improve performance.
critical_code_review_comments: MenuBar.jsx — MenuRow component cleanly supports one level of right-flyout submenu via onMouseEnter/Leave + click. data-testid='submenu-{id}' and data-testid='menuitem-{id}' applied uniformly for both top-level and nested items — very testable. setSubOpen(false) on mouse-leave works correctly.

proToolsMenuConfig.js — Window menu correctly inserted between View and Setup; final order is File/Edit/Track/Event/AudioSuite/Tools/View/Window/Setup/Help (10 menus). Verified pixel-positions in DOM: View=345, Window=395, Setup=463.

SystemUsageModal.jsx — 24 cores rendered with deterministic data-testid='core-0'..'core-23'. Live random walk uses setTimeout+requestAnimationFrame at ~220ms. Verified 24/24 cores updated their width after 1.2s window. Color thresholds (>80 red / >55 amber / else cyan) implemented correctly.

DiskUsageModal.jsx — Math BYTES_PER_MINUTE_STEREO_24_48 = 17.28 MB/min. Sessions SSD free=1560 GB → 1540.7 hr (within ±2 hr of expected 1540). All 5 volumes rendered with type/mount/size/used/free/% and 48 kHz 24-bit Track Min column.

Daw.jsx — waveformMode state plumbed via setStatusMsg on each of 5 wf_* clicks. Status bar updates with 'Waveform mode: Outlines' / 'Rectified' as expected. Submenu auto-closes after click via onAfterClick=close prop.
ESC key closes both modals (System Usage and Disk Usage) — modal close handlers wired correctly.

REGRESSION: all 9 old menus (file/edit/track/event/audiosuite/tools/view/setup/help) still open. BantuTeaser canvas still painted inside Event menu's 'Quantize to Bantu Oral Grid' item. View → Mixer still opens 'Mixer · All Tracks' modal.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — 9/9 review scenarios PASS: (1) menu order with Window between View/Setup, (2) Window submenu items visible, (3) Configurations submenu shows Alt+J / Alt+Shift+J, (4) Arrange submenu has Tile/Tile-H/Tile-V/Cascade, (5) System Usage modal with cpu-total + 24/24 cores + disk/mem gauges + buffer/voices/uptime + live updates, (6) Disk Usage 5 rows with math 1560 GB → 1540.7 hr ✓, (7) View → Waveforms 5-item submenu + status update on click, (8) MIDI track add + waveform mode switch reflected, (9) all 9 old menus + Mixer + Bantu teaser regression

seed_data_creation: None — system/disk usage data is intentionally simulated (CPU/cores/disk/mem random walk; 5 hardcoded fake volumes). This matches the mocked_apis_list in the request.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Pro Tools menu flows are stable. Key facts: (a) Help menu is right-aligned via marginLeft:auto so its x-position is ~1863px while Setup is ~463px — don't assume sorted x-positions across all 10. (b) Submenus open on hover with subOpen state — for Playwright use page.hover() then wait ~300ms before asserting submenu visibility. (c) Disk Usage 'Sessions SSD' row index is 1 (zero-based). (d) System Usage cores update every ~220ms; sample with at least 1s window to see changes. (e) Pre-existing TrackRow hydration warning (<span> in <option>) at line 71 is still present and should be fixed by main agent — non-blocking for tests but pollutes console. (f) Status bar at the bottom of Daw displays the current statusMsg, used to verify waveform mode changes and Arrange/Configurations clicks.
rca of the issue: No bugs. All scenarios from the review request executed successfully. The hydration <span>-in-<option> warning is a pre-existing issue from previous iterations (documented in iteration_8 action_items) and is unrelated to this iteration's menu/modal additions.
